zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie於1445年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾文寧時，他的父親Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie17歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Hepburn26歲。他於1459年與Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery在蘇格蘭艾斯爾坎寧安結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1483年3月3日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾格林頓 卡素享年38歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾文寧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie于1445年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾文寧时，他的父亲Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie17岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Hepburn26岁。他于1459年与Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery在苏格兰艾斯爾坎寧安结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1483年3月3日在苏格兰艾斯爾艾格林頓 卡素享年38岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾文寧。

nameMeanings.name: Montgomerie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, Scottish: Scottish spelling of   Montgomery  .

variants.name: Montgomery
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Sainte-Foy-de-Montgomery and Saint-Germain-de-Montgomery (Calvados). In Ireland this surname was present in the medieval period, died out, and was then reintroduced from Scotland in the 17th century. It has been Gaelicized in Ireland as Mac Iomaire and in Scotland as Mac Gumaraid.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie was born in 1445, in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie, was 17 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Hepburn, was 26. He married Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery in 1459, in Cunningham, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 3 March 1483, in Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 38, and was buried in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie est né en 1445, à Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Hepburn, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery en 1459, à Cunningham, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 3 mars 1483, à Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie 1445 in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie 17 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Hepburn 26. Er hat 1459 in Cunningham, Ayrshire, Scotland Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 3. März 1483 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie è nato il nel 1445 nel Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Hepburn, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery nel 1459, nel Cunningham, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 3 marzo 1483, nel Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerieが1445年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルウィニングで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerieは17歳，母Lady Elizabeth Hepburnは26歳であった。1459年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクウニンガムでKatherine Kennedy Lady Montgomeryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1483年3月3日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアエグリントン カストルで38歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアキルウィニングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie(이)가 1445년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬윈잉에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Hepburn(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1459년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 쿤잉함에서 Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1483년 3월 3일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 그린턴 카스틀에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬윈잉에 묻혔다.

mn.Giffin, Eglinton, Ayreshire, Scotland: Eglinton, Air, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie nasceu em 1445, em Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Hepburn, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery em 1459, em Cunningham, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de março de 1483, em Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie родился в 1445 г. в местности килвиннинг, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Hepburn, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery в 1459 г. в местности куннингхам, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 3 марта 1483 г. в местности эглинтон кастл, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности килвиннинг, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Montgomerie 2nd Lord Montgomerie nació en 1445, en Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Alexander Montgomerie Master of Montgomerie, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Hepburn, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Katherine Kennedy Lady Montgomery en 1459, en Cunningham, Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 3 de marzo de 1483, en Eglinton Castle, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Kilwinning, Ayrshire, Scotland.
